violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Food observed in contact with unclean surfaces in the food prep unit. Discussed not overfilling containers with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer is to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Date marking procedures show food would be disposed of after 8 days. Date marking procedures reviewed, allowing 7 days only. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potato salad was placed hot in the display case in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Potato salad was relocated to refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Food thermometers are not calibrated. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fans have an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the rolling rack have an accumulation of food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
One ceiling light bulb in the kitchen nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
